author: anshchoudhary
name: WiderMLP FP16Embed Stride32
blurb: Non-record submission: 10-layer GPT with MLP_MULT=3, fp16 tied embedding, mixed int6/int8 quantization (layers 2-8 at int6), stride-32 sliding window eval. Artifact 18.97MB exceeds 16MB cap; eval took ~17min exceeds 10min limit. Reported for technique reference: val_bpb=1.1601.
